name: Pack Of 12 - Spectrum Gusto Lick Snack For Cat With Salmon 4x15g

tags.name: Bulk Cat Food & Bulk Dog Food

shortDescription: Spectrum Gusto Lick Snack Salmon – creamy, lickable cat treat with real salmon loin. Low fat, high moisture, perfect for dessert or everyday feeding.
description: Spoil your cat with Spectrum Gusto Lick Snack Salmon , a creamy, lickable treat made with 29.4% real salmon loin for an irresistible taste. This smooth, soft snack is perfect as a dessert, reward, or everyday indulgence , encouraging bonding and playful interaction between you and your cat. The treat is high in moisture (87%) to help support hydration and low in fat (1%) , making it a healthy option for cats of all ages. Modified tapioca starch (E1442) and guar gum (E412) ensure a creamy, easy-to-serve texture , while the carefully selected ingredients provide a natural, wholesome flavor cats love. Serve in small portions on a spoon to make feeding fun and interactive. Always provide fresh drinking water alongside the treat. Key Benefits Made with real salmon loin (29.4%) for natural taste Creamy, lickable texture for easy feeding High moisture content (87%) supports hydration Serve in small portions with a spoon for bonding and play Low fat (1%) and no artificial colors or flavors Nutritional Information Ingredients Water Salmon whole loin 29.4% Modified tapioca starch (E1442) Guar gum (E412) Soybean oil Analytical Constituents Crude Protein: 6% Fat content: 1% Crude Ash: 1% Crude Cellulose (Fiber): 0.1% Moisture: 87%   Feeding & Storage Advice Serve as a dessert or everyday treat Offer in small portions on a spoon Provide fresh drinking water at all times See packaging imprint for full instructions
